summary: Frontend-only verification of the Settings/Mail-Settings label fix. Signed in as peter@w.xyz, navigated to /(tabs)/settings, confirmed the row with testID 'row-mail-section' renders EXACTLY 'Mail Settings'. Tapped it -> navigated to /settings/mail and the header reads EXACTLY 'Mail Settings'. Regression: Bottom tab labels are Watch / Inbox / Settings (no Chats tab). /(tabs)/mail still shows 'Inbox' as page title. open-chat-btn is visible on Inbox header and tapping it navigates to /chats which shows 'Chat' as the screen title. All 5 acceptance criteria from the review request are satisfied. The previously reported stale text was a cache artifact — rendered output now matches source.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — minor RN web style deprecation, not blocking.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — minor, non-blocking.
Animated.useNativeDriver warning on web preview — expected, not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings row label 'Mail Settings' and /settings/mail header 'Mail Settings' are confirmed working as of iteration 15. Bottom tabs verified as Watch/Inbox/Settings (no Chats). /chats screen titled 'Chat' reachable via open-chat-btn on Inbox.
rca_of_issue: Source files (/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx line 48 and /app/frontend/app/settings/mail.tsx line 19) both correctly contain the 'Mail Settings' literal. The Expo restart + mtime bump successfully invalidated the Metro cache; the rendered UI now matches source. The earlier 'stale text' observation was a client-side cache issue that has been resolved.
